---
title: "2c: CDS Pangenome Construction Report"
---

## Overview

This report summarizes the CDS pangenome construction step, which clusters protein sequences from BAKTA-annotated genomes using CD-HIT to produce gene and allele presence/absence matrices.

## Pangenome Summary

```{python}
import pandas as pd

summary = pd.read_csv("../output/data/2c_pangenome_summary.csv")
for _, row in summary.iterrows():
    print(f"{row['metric']}: {row['value']}")
```

## Genes per Genome Distribution

![](../output/figures/2c_genes_per_genome.png){width=80%}
